name: Jolly Roger
description: Jolly Roger Amusement Park is an amusement park located in Ocean City, Maryland.  The park features two locations in Ocean City: one at the pier on the Ocean City boardwalk and one further uptown at 30th Street.  Both locations feature numerous thrill rides, including a looping roller coaster at the pier, bumper cars, a ferris wheel, a carousel, and kiddie rides, among others.
